data.title: Bravo Mining Reports Significant Resource Growth at Luanga Project
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Bravo Mining Corp. ( (TSE:BRVO) ).

Bravo Mining Corp. has announced a significant update to its 2025 Mineral Resource Estimate for its Luanga Project in Brazil, indicating a substantial increase in measured and indicated palladium equivalent resources by 154% compared to the 2023 estimate. This update strengthens Bravo’s position as a major player in the global PGM mining industry and highlights its potential for continued growth, with a well-supported community and ongoing exploration activities.

More about Bravo Mining Corp.

Bravo Mining Corp. is a mining company that operates in the metals and mining industry. Its primary focus is on the extraction of palladium, platinum, rhodium, gold, and nickel, with its primary market focus on large-scale, open-pit PGM deposits. The company is strategically located in mining-friendly regions with access to essential infrastructure and renewable power sources.

YTD Price Performance: 15.58%

Average Trading Volume: 18,083

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$230.2M

data.title: Green Minerals AS Launches Rights Issue to Boost Sustainable Mining Operations
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Green Minerals AS ( (DE:5IP) ) has issued an announcement.

Green Minerals AS has announced a contemplated underwritten rights issue to raise gross proceeds between NOK 5 million and EUR 1 million. This move is part of the company’s financial strategy to enhance its operations and strengthen its market position in providing sustainable mining solutions. The rights issue offers existing shareholders subscription rights at a price of NOK 2.00 per share, with the potential to issue up to 5.5 million new shares, although these rights will not be listed on any exchange.

More about Green Minerals AS

Green Minerals AS is dedicated to providing minerals crucial for the green energy transition through deep sea mining of critical minerals and rare earth elements (REE). The company’s operations aim to significantly reduce the environmental and social costs associated with terrestrial mining, while addressing strategic resource needs for the EU and the USA.

YTD Price Performance: -12.87%

Average Trading Volume: 1,290

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: €4.52M

data.title: Tefron Announces Changes in Securities Registry Through Option Exercise
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Tefron ( (IL:TFRLF) ).

Tefron has announced a change in its capital structure through the exercise of employee options, affecting the corporation’s securities registries. This adjustment involves a decrease in the holder’s balance of non-tradable options managed by IBI Trust Management, reducing from 234,946 to 232,963. The corporation noted this change occurred between February 1 and February 18, 2025, and it has implications for the registry of securities holders, aligning with the corporation’s ongoing management of its employee option program.

More about Tefron

data.description:

The latest update is out from Spirent Communications ( (GB:SPT) ).

UBS Group AG, through its Investment Bank & Global Wealth Management division, has acquired a significant voting rights stake in Spirent Communications PLC, crossing a notable threshold with 6.842246% of total voting rights as of February 14, 2025. This acquisition positions UBS as a key stakeholder, potentially influencing Spirent’s strategic decisions and impacting its market dynamics.

More about Spirent Communications

Spirent Communications PLC is a UK-based company operating in the telecommunications industry. It specializes in providing testing, assurance, and analytics solutions to ensure the quality and performance of communications networks and services.

data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.

MicroCloud Hologram ( (HOLO) ) has issued an update.

On February 17, 2025, MicroCloud Hologram Inc. entered into Convertible Note Purchase Agreements with investors, issuing $40 million in Unsecured Convertible Promissory Notes on February 18, 2025. These notes are part of a registered direct offering and are intended to provide the company with working capital and support general corporate purposes. The issuance may impact the company’s market positioning by providing additional financial resources, while investors gain the potential to convert their notes into shares, influencing shareholder composition.

More about MicroCloud Hologram

MicroCloud Hologram Inc. operates in the hologram technology sector, providing advanced holographic solutions. The company focuses on developing and selling products that leverage holographic technology to enhance visual experiences and communication methods.

data.title: Rokmaster Resources Secures Exploration Permit for Fox-Coconut Property
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Rokmaster Resources ( (TSE:RKR) ) has provided an announcement.

Rokmaster Resources Corp. has received a three-year exploration permit for the Fox-Coconut Property, part of their Nechako Project in British Columbia. This approval enables the company to conduct extensive exploration activities, including IP geophysical surveying, trenching, and diamond drilling, potentially enhancing their resource base and strengthening their position in the mining industry.

More about Rokmaster Resources

Rokmaster Resources Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral properties. Their primary products include gold, silver, copper, and molybdenum, with a market focus on significant mineralization targets in British Columbia, Canada.

data.title: Phillips 66 Announces Board Member Departures in 2025
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Phillips 66 ( (PSX) ) has provided an update.

On February 12, 2025, Phillips 66 announced that board members Gary K. Adams and Denise L. Ramos decided not to stand for reelection at the company’s 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, as part of the board’s ongoing refreshment activities. Their departure will result in the reduction of the board size from 14 to 12 directors, effective immediately after the Annual Meeting, indicating a strategic shift but not due to any disagreements with company policies.

More about Phillips 66

Phillips 66 is a diversified energy manufacturing and logistics company, with operations centered in refining, marketing, and transporting petroleum products. The company focuses on delivering energy products and services that cater to the evolving needs of the market.
